description: Hardcoded Project & Filename References (Rules 3, 4, 6, 25) - violates universal framework philosophy.
Hardcoded Fallback Values (Rule 1) - forces domain-specific conventions (e.g. 999).
Specific Domain Terminology / Data Structures (Rule 25) - hardcoded 4-sheet isolation rules dictating specific data architecture.
Hardcoded Directory Structures (Rule 26) - hardcodes the directory path for 03_Coding_Rulebook.
Subagent Version Mismatch - SKILL.md instructs v2, whereas swarm_prep.py hardcodes bsma_reviewer_v5.
Target Excel File Mismatch - SKILL.md references BSMA_Master_Coding_Sheet.xlsx, while scripts hardcode BSMA_AI_Run_V2.xlsx.
4-Sheet Physical Isolation Rule Violation - swarm_inject.py generically injects into wb.active without targeting specified sheets.
Batch Size Discrepancy - SKILL.md specifies batches of 40, whereas swarm_prep.py internal default is 20.
Dynamic Prompt Tuning Breaks Replicability - Orchestrator dynamically tunes subagent prompts, destroying fixed a priori coding protocol required for meta-analysis.
Self-Evolution & DNA Updates - allowing the Troika to debate and formulate new rules mid-extraction leads to an inconsistent dataset.
Agent 6 (Domain Specialist Wildcard) - dynamically adopts domain knowledge, introducing external, non-pre-registered theoretical assumptions.
Debate-Driven Consensus - subagents debate to reach consensus, risking rationalization of data not explicitly stated and violating zero-guesswork policy.
